description: Sunshine Silver Mining & Refining Company operates as a silver mining company in the United States. The company is the owner and developer of the Sunshine Mine and the Sunshine Silver/Copper Refinery, as well as the associated facilities including the Sunshine Tailings Storage Facility and historical antimony refinery grounds. Its Sunshine Mine is a historic, permitted, large-scale past-producing silver mine with an average diluted silver grade of 1,022 grams per tonne of Indicated Mineral Resources and 776 grams per tonne of Inferred Mineral Resources. Its principal asset is the Sunshine Comp
